_comment_target: Renovate config for the @deeplake/hivemind npm package (ESM, Node >=22, npm + package-lock.json)
_comment_minimumReleaseAge: Delay PRs for packages published less than 7 days ago (rush-the-window attack protection, covers the native-dep surface)
_comment_schedule: Open update PRs on Monday mornings to batch review
_comment_lockFileMaintenance: Weekly PR to refresh package-lock.json within declared semver ranges

packageRules._comment: Automerge devDependencies patch and minor versions (build/test only)
Group all patch updates into a single PR to keep the stream readable
GUARDED: pinned tree-sitter grammars are exact-pinned in package.json overrides. Never automerge; bump manually with a behavioral review and update overrides in the same PR.
Native install-time deps: hold longer, no automerge - postinstall runs build code on consumers
Never automerge major version bumps anywhere

_comment_prConcurrentLimit: Limit concurrent Renovate PRs to avoid overwhelming reviewers
_comment_labels: Label Renovate PRs for easy filtering
